caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a round table equipped with a laptop and some documents. The man on the right appears to be speaking animatedly, using hand gestures to emphasize his points, while the man on the left listens attentively, occasionally nodding. The background shows a spacious, well-lit hall with other attendees walking around, indicating an active conference environment. The setting suggests a formal yet engaging discussion, likely centered around topics related to MongoDB and its applications in the tech industry.
